sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Comcast Corporation 2026 Q2 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) 2026-07-23
feed.summary: This article announces the publication of Comcast Corporation's 2026 Q2 earnings call presentation. The slide deck was released in conjunction with their earnings call on July 23, 2026. The content is provided by SA Transcripts, which focuses on developing and publishing earnings call transcripts.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Rockets 10%, RTX Jumps 7% on Beat-and-Raise Quarters and Record Backlogs
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin and RTX reported beat-and-raise second-quarter results for 2026, leading to significant stock surges of 10% and 7% respectively. Both defense contractors achieved record backlogs, with Lockheed Martin reaching $230 billion and RTX hitting $289 billion. The strong performance, driven by global rearmament, has also positively impacted the broader aerospace and defense sector, including the iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF, though Boeing remained unchanged.

feed.title: Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) Faces Profit-Taking After Recent Gains
feed.summary: Skyworks Solutions (SWKS) experienced a 4% stock price decline due to profit-taking after recent gains and a KeyBanc downgrade citing smartphone market concerns. Despite strong financial health and profitability, the company faces challenges in growth, with analysts maintaining a Hold rating. Insiders have shown caution with recent sell transactions and no buys.

feed.title: L3Harris sets Sept. 18 date for $1.25 dividend payment
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.25 per common share. The dividend is payable on September 18, 2026, to shareholders of record as of September 4, 2026. L3Harris is a defense technology company focusing on end-to-end technology solutions for national security.

feed.title: These Three Railroad Stocks Hit Fresh 52-Week Highs Today – What’s Got Investors Buzzing?
feed.summary: CSX, Union Pacific, and Norfolk Southern all reached new 52-week highs after reporting better-than-expected second-quarter earnings. Brokerages have raised price targets for CSX and Union Pacific, citing strong performance, increased revenues, and optimistic outlooks. Norfolk Southern also beat analyst estimates for revenue and adjusted EPS, contributing to the positive sentiment in the railroad sector.

feed.title: Celsius (NASDAQ:CELH) Sets New 52-Week Low - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Celsius Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:CELH) reached a new 52-week low of $27.30 during Thursday's trading, despite analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $58.65. The company recently exceeded earnings expectations with an EPS of $0.41 and revenue of $782.62 million, up 137.7% year-over-year. Insider buying by the CEO and a director was also reported, indicating confidence in the stock despite the recent price drop.

feed.title: Visa's World Cup sponsorship pays off ahead of earnings; Northern Trust joins banks lifted by IPOs, capital markets—and more in Bankers' Hours
feed.summary: Visa's World Cup sponsorship led to a 20% increase in cross-border payments around match sites, demonstrating the impact of major events on "pop-up" economics. Northern Trust also reported strong second-quarter performance, benefiting from increased IPO activity and capital markets strength, similar to other major US banks. Additionally, a new survey suggests scam losses in 2025 were significantly higher than reported to the government, with most victims turning to banks and payment apps for help.

feed.title: Coeur Mining bets US$158mn on Mexico amid US mining slowdown
feed.summary: Coeur Mining is investing US$158 million in an exploration program for 2026 at its Palmarejo and Las Chispas deposits in Mexico, marking the largest such investment in its history. This move highlights Coeur Mining as a significant US player in a Mexican mining market largely dominated by Canadian capital. The investment, which doubles the previous year's, focuses on extending the operational life of its mines and growing its reserves, contrasting with the lower profile of other US miners in the region.

feed.title: Honeywell Raises EPS Outlook, Cuts Sales Forecast After First Post-Split Earnings
feed.summary: Honeywell reported mixed second-quarter results, beating revenue expectations but missing on adjusted EPS. The company raised its full-year adjusted EPS outlook while simultaneously lowering its sales forecast. This comes after the recent spin-off of its Aerospace Technologies business into a new public company, Honeywell Aerospace Inc.

feed.title: 3M Company (NYSE: MMM) insider plans sale of 924 shares via Form 144
feed.summary: An insider at 3M Company (NYSE: MMM) plans to sell 924 shares of common stock through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC, with an aggregate value of $156,544.17. The shares were acquired between 2011 and 2026 through restricted stock vesting and dividend reinvestment, including a significant vesting of 789 shares on May 3, 2026. This Form 144 filing indicates a neutral impact and sentiment regarding the transaction.

feed.title: [GL Q2 2026 Earnings Call] Globe Life Raises 2026 EPS Guidance to $15.55–$15.95 as Health Premiums Surge 16% and Buybacks Jump $100M
feed.summary: Globe Life Inc. reported strong Q2 2026 results, with net operating income up 10% to $3.61 per share and total premiums growing 7%, driven by a 16% surge in health premiums. The company raised its full-year 2026 EPS guidance to $15.55–$15.95 and increased planned share repurchases by $100 million to $670–$700 million, citing confidence in its resilient business model despite some health underwriting margin pressures and a decline in direct-to-consumer sales due to AI-driven search changes. Management expects agent count and sales growth to rebound in the second half of the year.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land Corp (TPL) holder Horizon Kinetics notes minor share buy
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a significant owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp (TPL), recently purchased a single share of common stock for $427.42. This transaction occurred on July 22, 2026, increasing their direct holdings to 3,263,681 shares, while their beneficial ownership, as per a May 7, 2026 Schedule 13D amendment, remains at 10,109,933 shares. The purchase was filed as a Form 4 and coded as an "open market or private transaction."

feed.title: Apple Maps to power Ford's new $30K EV platform
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co. will integrate Apple's MapKit for Automotive software development kit into its Universal Electric Vehicle platform, which is set to launch in 2027. This integration will power Ford's new $30,000 electric vehicle platform. The announcement was made by the Silicon Valley Business Journal, with an article preview indicating a publication date of July 23, 2026.

feed.title: NUE (NUE) insider files Form 144 to sell 17,399 shares of stock
feed.summary: An insider at NUCOR CORP (NUE) has filed a Form 144, indicating a proposed sale of 17,399 shares of common stock with a market value of over $4.2 million through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC. The filing details that these shares mostly stem from restricted stock vesting events in June 2026 and also references a prior sale of 12,888 shares in May 2026. Daniel R. Needham is identified as the reporting person for this transaction.

feed.title: SCHWAB CHARLES CORP SEC Filing (Jul 23, 2026)
feed.summary: This article details an SEC Form 144 filing by Charles Schwab Corporation on July 23, 2026. The filing indicates the proposed sale of 6,952 shares of common stock, which were acquired through Restricted Stock Units (RSU) on March 1, 2026. The filing was accepted by the SEC EDGAR system at 01:41 PM on the same day.

feed.title: North Carolina AG asks for comments on 'backroom' EPA-Chemours PFAS deal
feed.summary: North Carolina Attorney General Jeff Jackson is urging residents to comment on a proposed settlement between the EPA and Chemours regarding PFAS contamination, which he calls a "backroom deal." Jackson argues the agreement was negotiated without state input and gives Chemours too much control over cleanup projects, primarily allocating funds outside North Carolina. The settlement, valued at $450 million in total, would prevent over 2,600 plaintiffs from pursuing their cases against Chemours in federal court.

feed.title: BOS Secures $990,000 Order from a U.S. Customer
feed.summary: BOS Better Online Solutions Ltd. (NASDAQ: BOSC) announced its Supply Chain Division secured a $990,000 purchase order from an existing U.S. customer for electromechanical connectors. The delivery is anticipated in late 2026 and early 2027. The company highlighted significant international sales growth, particularly in the U.S. and India, which saw a 165% increase year-to-date, reaching $8.5 million.

feed.title: Camtek (CAMT) Leans On AI Packaging Growth As Valuation Questions Build
feed.summary: Camtek (CAMT) has seen mixed stock performance recently, with a slight gain in the latest session but a 7% drop over the past month, though it boasts strong long-term returns. Valued at $187.25 by Simply Wall St, Camtek is considered undervalued despite current market skepticism reflected in its high P/S ratio compared to industry averages, driven by accelerating AI-driven demand for advanced packaging. This valuation depends on continued strong earnings growth and market alignment with expert forecasts, while facing risks from geopolitical tensions and competitor pricing.

feed.title: Dollar General donates $1 million to Feeding America, surpassing 90 million meals in food support
feed.summary: Dollar General has made a new $1 million donation to Feeding America, bringing its total financial support since 2019 to over $6 million. This contribution, combined with in-kind food donations, has resulted in the equivalent of more than 90 million meals provided to communities through Feeding America’s network. The retailer emphasizes its commitment to addressing hunger and expanding food access, especially in underserved areas, and continues to be a strategic partner in promoting better nutrition.

feed.title: Data Centers Turbocharge Jet Engine Maker In A Battle For Power
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace (HWM), a jet engine parts manufacturer, is benefiting from strong demand in both the aerospace and data center industries for engine blades, vanes, and turbines. The stock is currently setting up as an IBD 50 Stocks To Watch candidate, despite a recent 8% drop from a late-stage consolidation triggering a sell signal.

feed.title: 10 Health Care Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today’s Session
feed.summary: This article details "whale alerts" in 10 healthcare stocks, highlighting unusual options activity that could indicate significant trading opportunities. It explains call and put contracts, expiration dates, and option prices, providing a breakdown of specific transactions for companies like Centene, Novo Nordisk, and Eli Lilly, each with their respective sentiment and contract details. The report aims to help traders identify potential market movements based on these large-scale options trades.

feed.title: Why Rollins (ROL) Shares Are Sliding Today
feed.summary: Rollins (NYSE:ROL) shares dropped 9.5% after the company reported weaker-than-expected Q2 financial results, missing analyst estimates for non-GAAP earnings, revenue, and adjusted EBITDA. The pest control company's operating margin and free cash flow margin also declined, leading to a negative market reaction despite year-on-year revenue growth. This performance contrasts with a strong Q3 2025 report where the company surpassed profit forecasts.

feed.title: Emerson Electric shares rise as recent analyst upgrade and backlog optimism support sentiment
feed.summary: Emerson Electric (EMR) shares rose 3.2% following an analyst upgrade highlighting strong backlog and a favorable second-half outlook. The company's upcoming Q3 2026 earnings report on August 4, 2026, and its positive full-year EPS and free cash flow guidance further supported investor sentiment. Insider trading data for EMR shows more sales than purchases over the past six months, while institutional investors have mixed positions.

feed.title: Dow Drops 525 Points On Losses In Alphabet Inc. Cl A, Amazon.Com Inc. Stocks
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average dropped 525 points on losses in major tech stocks including Alphabet Inc. Class A and Amazon.com Inc. Other significant contributors to the index's decline were Microsoft and Salesforce, reflecting a broader market downturn.

feed.title: CN agrees to end opposition to Union Pacific’s railway mega-merger in U.S.
feed.summary: Canadian National Railway Co. (CN) has agreed to drop its opposition to Union Pacific Corp.'s proposed US$85-billion acquisition of Norfolk Southern Corp. In exchange, CN will gain significant network access in the U.S. Midwest and more direct access to Mexico. The agreement, contingent on regulatory approval of the merger, would give CN rights to run trains on Union Pacific tracks in Illinois and between Memphis and Eagle Pass, Texas, while Union Pacific would gain expanded operating rights on CN's Elgin, Joliet & Eastern Railway.

feed.title: Waste Management (WM) Lifts Dividend 14.5% As It Unveils $3 Billion Buyback
feed.summary: Waste Management (WM) reported a strong 2025, driven by growth in renewable natural gas and recycling, and announced a 14.5% dividend increase for 2026. The company also unveiled a new US$3 billion share repurchase program. These initiatives highlight WM's dual focus on growth projects and returning capital to shareholders, making it a significant stock for long-term income and infrastructure-oriented portfolios, despite a flagged high level of debt.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Crown Holdings (CCK) Could Change Following Raised Guidance And $1.21B Buyback Completion
feed.summary: Crown Holdings (CCK) recently reported strong Q2 2026 results with increased sales and net income, completed a significant $1.21 billion share buyback, and raised its full-year earnings guidance. This solid performance, combined with ongoing investments in growth markets, strengthens the company's investment narrative for dependable earnings and higher shareholder returns. However, investors are cautioned to consider persistent input cost inflation as a potential risk.

feed.title: Pentair plc (PNR) Securities Investigation Notice - Levi & Korsinsky
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky is investigating Pentair plc (PNR) following a significant cut in its FY2026 adjusted EPS guidance from $5.35 to $4.70. The investigation aims to determine if investors received timely and accurate information regarding the company's earnings outlook before this July 2026 reset. Shareholders who suffered losses after purchasing PNR shares before this disclosure are encouraged to provide their trading details to the firm.

feed.title: Live Nation UK Probe Targets Data Lock-In That US Settlement Left Intact
feed.summary: Britain's Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) is reportedly initiating private meetings with music industry figures, signaling a potential formal investigation into Live Nation's market dominance in the UK. This follows a parliamentary committee report that found Live Nation meets the CMA's threshold for market dominance across multiple sectors and a US federal jury's finding of an illegal monopoly. Unlike the US settlement, the UK probe may target Live Nation's data integration architecture, which critics argue locks in its competitive advantage regardless of behavioral remedies.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Stock Just Posted Its Biggest Beat Ever. The AI Threat Story Behind It.
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) achieved its largest quarterly outperformance, with Next-Generation Security (NGS) Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) surging 60% year-over-year to $8.13 billion, driven by increasing AI-fueled cyber threats and the success of its Prisma AIRS product. Despite this record beat and a raised full-year guidance, the stock trades just 7% below its recent high after recovering from a significant drawdown. Analysts remain bullish, and TIKR’s model projects further upside, emphasizing that AI threats are expanding, rather than contracting, the cybersecurity market.

feed.title: Why Is United Rentals (URI) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
feed.summary: Shares of United Rentals (URI) surged 12.1% after the equipment rental company reported strong second-quarter results, beating Wall Street's revenue and earnings estimates. The company also raised its full-year guidance for both revenue and EBITDA. This positive performance contrasts with a previous drop six months ago when the company missed Q4 financial expectations.

feed.title: Walt Disney Co Stock (DIS) Moved Down by 3.14% on Jul 23: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Walt Disney Co (DIS) stock fell 3.14% on July 23rd, driven by concerns over cooling domestic theme park attendance and high costs associated with ESPN's direct-to-consumer transition. Macroeconomic factors like restrictive monetary policy and intense streaming competition are also pressuring the company's valuation, leading to caution among investors. The stock's technical indicators suggest a neutral to sell condition, and fundamental analysis shows it ranks first in revenue and net profit within the Cyclical Consumer Services industry, although analysts highlight risks related to demand moderation and content execution.

feed.title: Union Pacific Corp Stock (UNP) Moved Up by 4.54% on Jul 23: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Union Pacific Corp (UNP) saw its stock rise by 4.54% on July 23, driven by a strong second-quarter financial performance that exceeded market expectations, improved operating efficiency, and positive volume growth. The company's disciplined cost management, updated optimistic guidance, and commitment to shareholder returns are attracting investors, despite some underlying risks such as an increased operating ratio and surging fuel costs. Technical indicators suggest a buy signal, while media coverage is moderate with an overall bullish market sentiment.

feed.title: Civista Bancshares (CIVB) Q2 2026 earnings summary
feed.summary: Civista Bancshares reported Q2 2026 net income of $14.3 million, a 30% increase year-over-year, with diluted EPS at $0.69. The company saw an expansion in net interest margin to 3.89% and improved its efficiency ratio to 58.2%. CEO Dennis Shaffer is set to retire in August 2026, with Chuck Parcher named as his successor.

feed.title: IR5632041 Bond Coupon Profile — Rate & Payments
feed.summary: This article provides the coupon profile for the Ingersoll Rand Inc. bond, IR5632041. It details the bond's current coupon rate of 5.40% and notes that the next interest payment is scheduled for August 14, 2026. The bond, maturing on August 14, 2028, is listed on FINRA.

feed.title: Uber cuts 10% of customer service staff to ‘embrace’ AI
feed.summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has reduced its customer service team by 10%, attributing the cuts to greater efficiency gained through artificial intelligence. This move, announced internally on July 22, 2026, also involves directing affected remote employees to relocate to hub offices, signifying both an operational and cultural shift. The company emphasizes that AI integration requires an effective organizational structure, highlighting a broader trend where other companies like Block Inc. and Oracle Corporation have also cited AI for workforce reductions.

feed.title: How Kraft Heinz Turned Soccer's Biggest Tournament into a Global Moment
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz successfully engaged with soccer's biggest tournament not as a sponsor, but by leveraging cultural moments and real consumer behaviors. Through campaigns like HEINZ's collaboration with Heineken, "Unofficial Stadium Ketchup," and Kraft's "TSA-Compliant Ranch," the company created timely, relevant, and shareable activations that resonated with fans and drove sales. These initiatives highlight how modern marketing can effectively connect with audiences by quickly responding to cultural signals and anchoring in authentic brand truths.

feed.title: Albertsons Companies (NYSE:ACI) Cut to "Equal Weight" at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company downgraded Albertsons Companies (NYSE:ACI) from "overweight" to "equal weight" and set an $11.00 price target, implying a potential downside. This downgrade follows Albertsons missing Q1 EPS estimates and cutting its FY2026 guidance, which combined with a 22% stock drop, reinforces investor concerns. Other analysts have also adjusted their ratings and price targets, resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating for the company.

feed.title: Cracker barrel sells Maple Street Biscuit chain to focus on core operations
feed.summary: Cracker Barrel Old Country Store Inc. has sold its fast-casual subsidiary, Maple Street Biscuit Company, to Biscuit Belly LLC to sharpen its focus on the core Cracker Barrel brand and streamline its balance sheet. The sale includes the Maple Street trademark and assets for 35 locations, with the remaining 16 locations to be permanently closed. Cracker Barrel anticipates taking significant non-cash impairment charges but expects improved profitability and has raised its financial outlook for fiscal year 2026.

feed.title: PG&E (PCG) Sees Surge in Data Center Projects Despite Mixed Q2 E
feed.summary: PG&E (PCG) reported a significant increase in proposed data center projects, escalating from 5.1 GW to 12.7 GW, with 26 projects totaling 8.2 GW having paid application fees by Q2 2026. Despite this expansion strategy, only four projects (490 MW) have interconnection agreements, highlighting potential execution challenges. The company's Q2 profits rose to $761 million, but revenue growth remained stagnant, missing analyst forecasts, and a considerable insider sell-off of $1.8 million worth of shares over the past three months suggests caution for investors.

feed.title: Clark County approves 752-room Las Vegas Strip resort on former SkyVue site
feed.summary: Clark County commissioners have unanimously approved plans for a 752-room hotel-casino resort on the Las Vegas Strip, located on the former SkyVue Ferris wheel site. The project, proposed by developer Eli Applebaum, will feature a heart-shaped hotel tower with an LED facade and will incorporate the unfinished SkyVue concrete towers into a midair restaurant. This development aims to redevelop a site that has been largely vacant for over a decade.

feed.title: PNC rolls out securities-based lending for clients, part of mass affluent push
feed.summary: PNC has introduced a new securities-based lending solution for its wealth management clients, allowing them to access liquidity without selling their investments. This initiative is part of PNC's broader strategy to cater to mass affluent customers and expand its market share. The offering is available to clients who meet specific asset thresholds.

feed.title: Tranche Update on Bread Financial Holdings, Inc.'s Equity Buyback Plan announced on August 27, 2025.
feed.summary: Bread Financial Holdings, Inc. has provided an update on its equity buyback plan announced in August 2025. The company repurchased 2.8 million shares, representing 6.78% of its equity for $241 million, between April 1, 2026, and June 30, 2026. This latest tranche brings the total repurchases under the plan to 7,419,489 shares, or 16.99% of its equity, for a total of $550.99 million.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean courts Mexican government with community center in Mahahual (RCL:NYSE)
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean (RCL) plans to develop a community center in Mahahual, Quintana Roo, Mexico, as it seeks approval for a private destination on the Yucatan Peninsula. This initiative follows the Mexican government's previous rejection of Royal Caribbean's plans in May. The move appears to be an effort to strengthen ties with the government and local community to facilitate future project approvals.

feed.title: BCE Inc. (NYSE: BCE) to convert all Series AJ preferred shares by August 4, 2026
feed.summary: BCE Inc. has announced that all its floating-rate Series AJ Preferred Shares will convert to fixed-rate Series AI Preferred Shares on August 4, 2026, on a one-for-one basis. This widespread conversion is triggered because the number of Series AJ shares tendered for conversion into Series AI resulted in fewer than the 2,000,000 unit threshold remaining. Post-conversion, the Series AI shares will pay a quarterly fixed cash dividend at an annual rate of 5.10% for five years and will continue trading on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol BCE.PR.I.

feed.title: AIDS 2026: Gilead, governments must make HIV prevention medicine more accessible
feed.summary: Doctors Without Borders (MSF) urged Gilead Sciences and governments to make the HIV prevention medicine lenacapavir more accessible in low- and middle-income countries, especially Brazil. Lenacapavir is an injectable pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) that is nearly 100-percent effective against HIV but is currently priced out of reach and supply is restricted by Gilead. MSF called for the price to drop to no more than $40 per person per year and encouraged governments to use legal tools like compulsory licenses to override Gilead's monopoly for public health.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Thomas Travis Sells 6,500 Shares of Bank7 Corp (BS
feed.summary: Thomas Travis, President & CEO of Bank7 Corp (BSVN), sold 6,500 shares of the company on July 22, 2026, bringing his total holdings to 265,601 shares. This transaction is part of a trend of insider selling at Bank7 Corp, with no insider buys and nine insider sells over the past year. The stock is currently trading at $48.01, and GuruFocus classifies it as modestly overvalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.24.

feed.title: Popular Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Popular Inc. reported strong Q2 2026 financial results with a net income of $278 million and EPS of $4.35, marking a 15% increase from Q1. The company announced a 20% dividend increase to $0.90 per share and a new $1 billion share repurchase authorization, alongside the retirement of CEO Javier Ferrer, who will be succeeded by Jorge Garcia. Despite some seasonal declines, loan portfolios and deposits grew, and the company projects an 8% to 9% net interest income growth for the year while maintaining stable credit quality.

feed.title: The Two Divergent Futures Priced Into Caterpillar Stock
feed.summary: Caterpillar (CAT) stock is experiencing unusually high uncertainty, with the options market pricing in a potential range of $560 to $1412.7 per share over the next year. This volatility is driven by conflicting factors: strong demand from data centers boosting growth and backlog, versus significant profitability pressures, particularly from tariffs affecting the Resource Industries segment. Shareholders are advised to manage this risk through disciplined portfolio management and diversification rather than attempting to predict the stock's direction.

feed.title: Price to earnings forward of Primech Holdings Ltd. – NASDAQ:PMEC
feed.summary: This article displays financial information for Primech Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ: PMEC), focusing on its forward price-to-earnings ratio. The content is primarily a data placeholder from TradingView, indicating that no specific value or change has been recorded for this metric yet.
